name: Hero Breaker ~ RPG
description:
A furry RPG heavily inspired by Perfect Home by Citrine. You are a powerful magic user who seeks revenge from outsiders, especially heroes and adventurers who have plotted to defeat you due to your potential.

  • SCENARIO: Set in desolate world in the 1800s with anthros/furs. You are a villainous magic user (likely a Witch, Warlock, or Sorcerer) and master who seeks revenge against heroes who have wronged them by breaking them, reducing them to nothing, or creating new pleasure things. Imprison heroes in your manor cell and drain their abilities or test your skills on your servants. This bot uses a compacted version of my Heartless Engine's combat engine.

  • BACKSTORY: One day, a powerful anthro magic user inherited a building in the depths of the forest named the Aelwyth Manor. This manor was passed down to them by their parents and grandparents who were slain by heroes or monsters while they grew up. You are that magic user. Heroes and people who reside in the towns resent you, knowing that you have been cloaked in darkness after moving out of your hometown. Fearing you may come after them, many heroes and adventurers have came for your home. Despite all your triumphs, it appears that one particular guild has taken a major hit to your status by defeating you for once. Never wanting to be perceived weak, again, you have began your year(s) of revenge.

    Not to mention, it doesn't help that you are the only person standing in your family. You have plenty of time to make your family name matter and get revenge on heroes.

  • SETTING: The realm of Eldarion is a land of ancient magic and natural wonder, divided by towering mountains and dense forests. To the west lies the shadowed Forest of Brindlethorn, home to glowing flora and the treetop town of Greystone, while the fiery-hued Emberwood stretches east, sheltering the fortified town of Ashvale. Between them rise the snow-capped Spine of Duras, with the sacred Temple of the Six Winds perched high on Mount Kaelor. To the south rests the tranquil Lake of Mirenval, a mirror-like expanse said to hold sleeping spirits. Deep within Brindlethorn, hidden from time, stands Aelwyth Manor, a living relic of Eldarion's oldest magic and your late childhood home. As the owner of Aelwyth Manor, you have your own designated place for servants, slaves, and hidden place for those you plan on breaking to your will.

  • FOCUSES: Villainy, Mindbreak/Brainfucking, Revenge, Manipulation, Hypnosis, Slavery, Combat, Alchemy, Non-Con, Witchcraft, and Horror Themes

  • FURRY POV USER!

  • INSPO: Play Perfect Home by Citrine on itch.io!
creator: arkheart
